about.brandDescription: We are a modern streetwear brand focused on premium Clothes that blend comfort,

foundation.title: Foundation Establishment (2021)
points: In 2021, we started the August District Foundation with the idea of having full control and transparency over how the money we raise for various causes is used.
Instead of donating money to other charitable organizations, we created our own foundation.
This ensured that funds and resources could be easily monitored and sent directly to the source.

challenges.title: Challenges Of Registration & Approval
points: Establishing a charitable foundation is extremely challenging due to high standards.
Our application was rejected four times before approval.
The online process took around 1.5 years to complete.

charityStatus.title: Official UK Charity Status (2023)
points: In July 2023, we were officially admitted to the UK directory of charities.
We were assigned charity number: 1202851.
This milestone enabled us to carry out our first mission in April 2024.

mission.title: Our Mission & Future Goals
points: Our goal is to carry out one or two missions each year to support vulnerable communities.
We have built a dedicated volunteer team to plan these missions effectively.
For transparency, we will physically attend and document each mission.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We believe in sustainability, which is more than just a word for us. We strive to be more conscious of our products and services, making decisions that help reduce our environmental footprint and ensure a better future for generations to come.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.description: People who are passionate about our products, their community, and our company are our most important assets. Their dedication is what makes us different.
points: Designing products that reflect our values
Reducing our environmental impact with every step
Build and maintain solid trust

fashion.title: Fashion & Responsibility
fashion.description: Fashion can be a force for good. By choosing high-quality, sustainable fabrics and working with factories that share our values, we can create a positive impact on both people and the planet.
points: Using luxury, recycled materials
Ethical and safe working conditions
Reducing waste and our carbon footprint in production

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.faqQuestion0: Will the items include a collection of the most frequently asked?
faq.faqAnswer0: Sustainability is at the heart of our design process, ensuring every piece lasts.
faq.faqQuestion1: The section includes a collection of the most frequently asked questions about our brand.
faq.faqAnswer1: We source materials ethically and focus on reducing our carbon footprint.
faq.faqQuestion2: The sustainability section includes the most frequently asked questions.
faq.faqAnswer2: Our goal is to create a circular economy through durable and recyclable products.
faq.faqQuestion3: Does this section include the most frequently asked questions?
faq.faqAnswer3: We source materials ethically and focus on reducing our carbon footprint.
faq.faqHighlightTitle: This section includes a collection of frequently asked questions
faq.faqHighlightDescription: This section includes a collection of the most frequently asked questions about sugarcane-sourced clothing, helping you better understand our brand.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: By visiting our website and/or purchasing from us, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions, including all policies referenced herein and/or available by hyperlink. These Terms apply to all users of the site, including without limitation users who are browsers, vendors, customers, and contributors of content.
points: Governed by August District Ltd.
Applies to all visitors, customers, and contributors.
Continued use means acceptance of changes.
Terms may be updated at any time.

returns.title: Returns
returns.description: We accept returns within 14 days of receiving your items, provided the item is in its original condition and with the original packaging.
points: Items must be in original packaging with tags.
Excludes certain items like hygiene products.
Return shipping cost will be deducted from refund.
Shipping fees are non-refundable.

customs.title: Customs Charges
customs.description: The customer is responsible for any customs and import duties that may be applied at the destination by local authorities.

onlineStore.title: Online Store Terms
onlineStore.description: By agreeing to these Terms, you confirm that you are at least the age of majority in your state or province of residence.
points: No illegal or unauthorized use.
Breach will lead to termination of services.
Always use the services in a legal way.
Violations may result in termination of services.

general.title: General Conditions
general.description: We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason at any time. Your content (excluding credit card info) may be transferred unencrypted.
points: Credit card information is always encrypted.
Must not reproduce, duplicate or sell our services.
Section headings are for convenience only.

accuracy.title: Accuracy Of Information
accuracy.description: We are not responsible if information made available on this site is not accurate, complete or current. The material is provided for general information only.
points: Reliance on the material is at your own risk.
Historical data is provided for reference only.

products.title: Products & Services
products.description: Certain products or services may be available exclusively online and may have limited quantities.
points: Subject to our Return Policy for returns.
Customs may vary depending on your shipping country.
Returns follow our Returns Policy only.

billing.title: Billing & Account Information
billing.description: We reserve the right to refuse any order you place with us. We may limit or cancel quantities purchased per person or per order.
points: Must provide accurate account and contact details.
Maintain information so we can complete transactions.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Tools & Links
thirdParty.description: We may provide you access to third-party tools which we neither monitor nor have any control over.
points: We are not responsible for third-party links or content.
Review third-party rules carefully.

userComments.title: User Comments & Submissions
userComments.description: Any feedback or submissions you provide may be used by us at any time, without restriction.
points: We have no obligation to keep comments secret.
User stays solely responsible for comments.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.description: Your submission of personal information through the store is governed by our Privacy Policy.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibited.description: The site must not be used for any unlawful purpose, harassing others, or committing harmful activities.

liability.title: Disclaimer & Limitation Of Liability
liability.description: We do not guarantee that our service will be uninterrupted or error-free. We will not be liable for any direct or indirect damages.
points: Service is provided on an 'as is' basis.
Not liable for consequential damages.

termination.title: Termination
termination.description: These Terms are effective unless and until terminated by either you or us.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Kingdom.

changes.title: Changes To Terms
changes.description: We may update these Terms at any time. It is your responsibility to check for changes regularly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: For questions regarding these Terms, please contact us:
